sourcesContent:
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { PATHS } from '../../router/paths'; import './style.css'; export default function HomePage() { return (

Practice Project

Build a React workspace that feels intentional, clean, and alive.

Explore posts, routes, tables, and interactive components in one polished front-end practice app designed to grow with you.

Open Posts About Project

What You Have

  • Route-based pages with details views
  • Reusable table component with loading state
  • API-powered posts and local practice pages
Content

Posts

Browse live data in a clean table and open detailed views.

Practice

Todo

Manage state, add items, and move into details pages.

Interaction

Counters

Work on events, updates, and simple state transitions.

Identity

Profile

Practice context, editing local state, and structured profile sections.

Lifecycle

Lifecycle

See class component lifecycle behavior and conditional unmounting in action.

Layout

About

Review reusable cards, mapped content, and a cleaner section-based layout.

Navigation

Router

Review routes, params, links, and how page navigation works in this project.

); }
